title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.205 - Mutual companies other than life and fire insurance
text:
379.205.  Mutual companies other than life and fire insurance. — A number of persons, not less than twenty-five, a majority of whom shall be bona fide residents of this state, by complying with the provisions of sections 379.205 to 379.310*, may become together with others who may hereafter be associated with them or their successors, a body corporate for the purpose of carrying on the business of mutual insurance as herein provided.
(RSMo 1939 § 5950) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5839; 1919 § 6249 
*Section 379.310 was repealed by S.B. 262, 1967.
